title: Board column name changes does the form update also?
excerpt: I need to rename column on my board that has a form configured. If the column name changes does the form automatically update to new column names in the formatting. Smartsheet does now have this feature and I am wonderin…

posts.author: barbgroff (Barb Groff)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to rename column on my board that has a form configured. If the column name changes does the form automatically update to new column names in the formatting. Smartsheet does now have this feature and I am wondering if Monday does also. Thank you.
